attributes.action: Ban MPs from drinking whilst voting.
attributes.additional_details:
In any other profession you would not be allowed to drink during the day. If a teacher or doctor drank before going into a lesson with children or a surgery on a patient they would be fired immediately. 

MPs represent and decide on votes that affect millions around the country. 

Alcohol significantly impairs decision making by inhibiting the prefrontal cortex the brain's center for logic and reasoning. - National Library of Medicine. 

Sign to hold MPs accountable
attributes.background: To ban all alcohol in parliment whilst MPs are voting on decisions that effect millions of people around the country.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Ban the sale and consumption of alcohol in House of Commons venues
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/768417
